title: Paint vehicle chassis and panels
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Paint vehicle chassis and panels demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for painting

pcs.text: Paints and materials are identified and prepared according to workplace procedures1.2 Panels are masked off to ensure surrounding areas are protected from overspray1.3 Spraying equipment is selected and inspected, and faulty equipment identified, tagged and reported to appropriate personnel1.4 Paint colours are matched according to job specifications and vehicle paint code
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Paints and materials are identified and prepared according to workplace procedures1.2 Panels are masked off to ensure surrounding areas are protected from overspray1.3 Spraying equipment is selected and inspected, and faulty equipment identified, tagged and reported to appropriate personnel1.4 Paint colours are matched according to job specifications and vehicle paint code?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Paints and materials are identified and prepared according to workplace procedures1.2 Panels are masked off to ensure surrounding areas are protected from overspray1.3 Spraying equipment is selected and inspected, and faulty equipment identified, tagged and reported to appropriate personnel1.4 Paint colours are matched according to job specifications and vehicle paint code.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for painting

elements.title: Operate spraying equipment

pcs.text: Spray painting guns are checked and adjusted for spray pattern, fan width and paint flow2.2 Spray painting booths are inspected for correct operation and adjusted if required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Spray painting guns are checked and adjusted for spray pattern, fan width and paint flow2.2 Spray painting booths are inspected for correct operation and adjusted if required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Spray painting guns are checked and adjusted for spray pattern, fan width and paint flow2.2 Spray painting booths are inspected for correct operation and adjusted if required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Operate spraying equipment

elements.title: Apply paint

pcs.text: Primers and paint are applied to ensure interior and exterior surfaces are coated3.2 Paint is applied according to manufacturer’s recommended thickness, lustre and surface finish3.3 Paint coatings are monitored for surface blemishes3.4 Paint viscosity is monitored and adjusted to ensure compliance with paint manufacturer specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Primers and paint are applied to ensure interior and exterior surfaces are coated3.2 Paint is applied according to manufacturer’s recommended thickness, lustre and surface finish3.3 Paint coatings are monitored for surface blemishes3.4 Paint viscosity is monitored and adjusted to ensure compliance with paint manufacturer specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Primers and paint are applied to ensure interior and exterior surfaces are coated3.2 Paint is applied according to manufacturer’s recommended thickness, lustre and surface finish3.3 Paint coatings are monitored for surface blemishes3.4 Paint viscosity is monitored and adjusted to ensure compliance with paint manufacturer specifications.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Apply paint

elements.title: Inspect painted surfaces

pcs.text: Painted surfaces are visually inspected and faults identified4.2 Painted surfaces with paint faults are redirected for rework and appropriate personnel are notified
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Painted surfaces are visually inspected and faults identified4.2 Painted surfaces with paint faults are redirected for rework and appropriate personnel are notified?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Painted surfaces are visually inspected and faults identified4.2 Painted surfaces with paint faults are redirected for rework and appropriate personnel are notified.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Inspect painted surfaces

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Spraying equipment is cleaned and inspected according to workplace procedures5.2 Work areas are cleaned, and unused materials stored5.3 Waste materials are removed and disposed of according to workplace environmental procedures5.4 Workplace job sheets or production schedules are completed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Spraying equipment is cleaned and inspected according to workplace procedures5.2 Work areas are cleaned, and unused materials stored5.3 Waste materials are removed and disposed of according to workplace environmental procedures5.4 Workplace job sheets or production schedules are completed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Spraying equipment is cleaned and inspected according to workplace procedures5.2 Work areas are cleaned, and unused materials stored5.3 Waste materials are removed and disposed of according to workplace environmental procedures5.4 Workplace job sheets or production schedules are completed.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Complete work processes
